data.body: FIX LANDED: Gerrit change 264 (fix(review-bot): rebuild the code-review runner from the re-rooted cfg) SUBMITTED -> MERGED to main. Both SRs SATISFIED (Verified from CI + LLM-Review admin-override). Box i-00880b2c7f13527c5 auto-deploys within ~2-3min. Verifying bot recovery (joe-debug Step 6 replication) next: push a fresh change, confirm rebar review bot casts LLM-Review again.
